  • Uses of Parameter in org.episteme.core.ui

    Subclasses of Parameter in org.episteme.core.ui
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    BooleanParameter
    Parameter for Boolean values (checkbox/toggle).
    class 
    ChoiceParameter
    A parameter that allows choosing from a list of strings.
    class 
    NumericParameter
    Metadata for a numeric scientific parameter with bounds.
    class 
    QuantityParameter<Q extends Quantity<Q>>
    Metadata for a physical quantity parameter (e.g.
    class 
    RealParameter
    Metadata for a Real number parameter with bounds.
    class 
    StringParameter
    A parameter representing a string value.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
